## What this changes

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Tooling/script change
- [ ] Run result packaging/docs
- [ ] Case proposal or suite change

## Guardrails

- [ ] I did not include proprietary code, secrets, customer data, or private repo content.
- [ ] I did not add unreviewed local run output directly to the repo.
- [ ] If this changes accepted eval cases, there is a linked issue/proposal explaining the real-world failure mode.
- [ ] I ran the relevant validation command:

```bash
python tools/validate_case.py evals/sidecar-companion-v1/cases.jsonl
# and/or
python tools/validate_run.py <run-dir>
```

## Notes

Link any issue or run package here.
